SQLite / SQLiteCloud
DATABASE_URL
Tables:
User, LoginSession,
FitnessPlan, AssignedPlan,
FitnessTest, Report, IpftDate

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Notes:
• Auth uses JWT (lib/jwt.ts) + bcrypt (lib/auth.ts)
• DB access uses @sqlitecloud/drivers (lib/sqlitecloud-client.ts)
